job_summary: A Regulatory CRA ensures that all clinical trial activities comply with regulatory requirements across different countries.
key_responsibilities: Prepare and submit regulatory documents to authorities
Ensure compliance with agencies like U.S. Food and Drug Administration and
Manage ethics committee and institutional review board submissions
Track regulatory changes and implement updates
career_path: Regulatory CRA → Regulatory Specialist → Regulatory Affairs Manager
skills_required: ensure compliance with agencies like u.s. food and drug administration and
manage ethics committee and institutional review board submissions
prepare and submit regulatory documents to authorities
track regulatory changes and implement updates
